title: Verify migrate_project.py rename end-to-end (dry-run transplant against a scratch repo)
description: The public-English sweep renamed migracion_proyecto.py -> migrate_project.py and translated its live quickstart template. Syntax was checked but the transplant flow was NOT exercised. Run: python3 .harness/bin/migrate_project.py <scratch-target> --dry-run, then a real transplant into a throwaway dir; confirm seeded files reference migrate_project.py and no stale migracion_ references remain in live (non-evidence) code/docs. Hand off with the replayable commands.

notes.note: plan: run migrate_project.py --dry-run then real transplant into scratchpad/t300-target; grep seeded output for stale migracion_proyecto refs and English quickstart template

HANDOFF -> verifier: EXPECTED: dry-run writes nothing, real transplant seeds migrate_project.py (not migracion_proyecto.py) with an English quickstart template and zero stale 'migracion' refs. ACTUAL: matched exactly.

Replay commands (agent worker-a, scratch target only -- never touches source repo):
  SCRATCH=<scratchpad>/8b5794bc-d02f-4611-9aca-832a0a08a610/scratchpad/t300-target-replay
  mkdir -p $SCRATCH
  touch $SCRATCH/.marker
  python3 .harness/bin/migrate_project.py $SCRATCH --dry-run   # -> exit 0, prints action plan only
  find $SCRATCH -newer $SCRATCH/.marker -not -name .marker      # -> empty (dry-run wrote NOTHING)
  rm $SCRATCH/.marker
  python3 .harness/bin/migrate_project.py $SCRATCH              # -> exit 0, real transplant
  find $SCRATCH/.harness/bin -iname '*migracion*'                # -> empty, only migrate_project.py present
  grep -ril migracion $SCRATCH                                   # -> exit 1 (no matches) = no stale refs
  grep -A6 'Next steps for the human' <(python3 .harness/bin/migrate_project.py $SCRATCH --force)  # English quickstart ('Pose the goal, e.g.:' / 'Planner: decompose...')

Observed (this run, target=.../scratchpad/t300-target):
  - dry-run: exit 0, action plan printed 21 lines ([COPY]/[RESET]/[SKIP]), find -newer showed zero written files (only the pre-existing marker).
  - real run: exit 0, same 21-line plan executed for real; verified via 'find $SCRATCH -mindepth 1' listing every seeded file.
  - .harness/bin/migrate_project.py IS present in the seeded target; no migracion_proyecto.py anywhere (find -iname '*migracion*' empty).
  - grep -ril 'migracion' over the entire seeded tree: zero matches (exit 1).
  - Seeded _next_steps_text output (the 'live quickstart template' called out in commit c04d554) is in English: 'Next steps for the human: ... 4. Pose the goal, e.g.: "Read ORCHESTRATION.md and USAGE.md. ... Planner: decompose the remaining work onto the board and dispatch."' -- traced to migrate_project.py:_next_steps_text (git show c04d554 confirms this is the function the commit message calls 'live quickstart template translated').
  - plan.md provenance note correctly cites source repo path + generation 4 + real timestamp.
  - No source-repo files modified; no locks required since only migrate_project.py was invoked (read-only against source) and all writes targeted the scratch dir. Full raw outputs saved as artifacts (t300_dryrun_output.txt, t300_real_output.txt) plus the seeded tree itself (t300-target) for direct inspection.

VERIFIED (verifier-a, independent replay + fresh transplant in a NEW scratch dir t300-verify, distinct from worker's target/replay dirs): (1) dry-run: python3 .harness/bin/migrate_project.py $FRESH --dry-run -> exit 0, action-plan-only output, find $FRESH -newer marker -not -name .marker showed zero written files inside the dir. (2) real transplant: python3 .harness/bin/migrate_project.py $FRESH -> exit 0, full seed report, ends with English 'Next steps for the human' quickstart ('Pose the goal, e.g.: ... Planner: decompose the remaining work onto the board and dispatch.'), traced to migrate_project.py:_next_steps_text (def at line 390, 'Pose the goal' at line 396) confirming live function. (3) stale-name greps on BOTH trees: find $FRESH -iname '*migracion*' -> empty; grep -ril migracion $FRESH -> exit 1 (no match); find worker's t300-target -iname '*migracion*' -> empty; grep -ril migracion t300-target -> exit 1 (no match). migrate_project.py present at .harness/bin/migrate_project.py in fresh seed; no migracion_proyecto.py anywhere. (4) source-repo integrity: git status --short shows only blackboard.json/task.json churn from my own claim/update actions -- migrate_project.py made zero writes to source tree. Cognitive diversity vs producer: regenerated transplant independently into a brand-new dir never touched by worker-a, ruling out reliance on a pre-seeded/falsified artifact. All acceptance criteria (dry-run no-op, English quickstart, zero stale migracion refs, correct new filename) hold on replay.
